query:
SELECT a.id, a.applicationNumber, DATE_FORMAT(a.submittedAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as submitted_time, pd.email 
FROM applications a 
LEFT JOIN personal_detailed_info pd ON a.id = pd.applicationId 
WHERE a.status = 'submitted' 
ORDER BY a.submittedAt DESC 
LIMIT 1;
